## Description
Clearly describe the feature you'd like to see.

## Problem It Solves
Is this related to a current limitation or user need?

## Proposed Solution
How do you envision this feature working?

## Alternative Approaches
Any other ways to address this?

## Additional Context
Examples, references, or related issues.
